gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.gender = 'F') AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.client_id) * 100 FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.A3 = 'Prague'
pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(T2.gender = 'F') AS REAL) / COUNT(T2.client_id) * 100
FROM district AS T1
JOIN account AS T3 ON T1.district_id = T3.district_id
JOIN disp AS T4 ON T3.account_id = T4.account_id
JOIN client AS T2 ON T4.client_id = T2.client_id
WHERE T1.A3 = 'Prague';
question: What proportion of customers who have accounts at the Prague branch are female?
